closureCriteria.criterion: mint request requires accepted Read, accepted Fit, proof root, source root, dedupe root, settlement root, access policy, and Exchange sequence
evidence: packages/btd/src/range.ts assertMintAdmission validates accepted Read, accepted Fit, sourceManifestRoot, measurementReceiptRoot, fitReceiptRoot, proofRoot, dedupeReceiptRoot, settlementJournalRoot, exchangeReceiptRoot, accessPolicyId, accessPolicyHash, normalizedBitcodeVolume, tokenCount, and mintedAtExchangeSequence
packages/api/src/routes/btd-crypto.ts assertMintDraftAdmission validates the same commercial mint-draft admission roots before returning a draft

closureCriteria.criterion: negative tests prove no mint before settlement
evidence: packages/btd/__tests__/v27-crypto-primitives.test.ts rejects absent Read acceptance, absent Fit acceptance, empty proof root, empty settlement root, and missing positive Exchange sequence before allocation
packages/api/src/routes/__tests__/btd-crypto.test.ts rejects absent Read acceptance, absent Fit acceptance, empty proof root, and non-positive Exchange sequence at the route builder boundary

closureCriteria.criterion: source-to-shares proof artifacts include minted range roots
evidence: .bitcode/v27-source-to-shares-mint-admission-proof.json binds sourceManifestRoot, measurementReceiptRoot, proofRoot, dedupeReceiptRoot, settlementJournalRoot, exchangeReceiptRoot, accessPolicyHash, mintedRangeRoot, supplyReplayRoot, and Terminal receipt roots

closureCriteria.criterion: Terminal intent can point to the path without bypassing it
evidence: packages/api/src/routes/btd-crypto.ts builds a Terminal journal entry only after measurement, measureminting, range allocation, mint receipt, and optional contributor allocation have been derived
packages/api/src/routes/__tests__/btd-crypto.test.ts proves Terminal journal exchange sequence and receipt roots are present on successful mint drafts

validatedCommands.notes: Jest reports pre-existing duplicate manual mock warnings outside the V27 package/API slice.

nonPromotionAssertions: BITCODE_SPEC.txt remained V26 until Gate 16 promotion
BITCODE_SPEC_V27_PROVEN.md did not exist until Gate 16 promotion
Gate 4 closure does not claim persisted Exchange mint writes, generated V27 proof-family closure, signet finality, or promotion
No value-bearing mainnet readiness or launch is claimed by Gate 4 closure
